haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students greet each other and introduce themselves using basic expressions.

haftalar.kazanim: E5.1.2 — Numbers, dates and personal information
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students exchange personal information including age, birthday and phone number.
Students understand and use classroom language and follow instructions.
Students describe rooms, buildings and places using prepositions of place.
Students use there is/there are to describe their home and school.

haftalar.kazanim: E5.3.1 — Free time activities and sports
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students talk about their hobbies and free time activities using present simple.
Students express preferences using like/love/hate + verb-ing.
Students describe daily routines using frequency adverbs and present simple.
Students tell time and describe when they do activities.

haftalar.kazanim: E5.5.1 — Parts of the body and ailments
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students name body parts and talk about health problems.
Students give and receive health advice using modal verbs.

haftalar.kazanim: E5.6.1 — Types of films and opinions
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss film genres and express opinions about movies.
Students describe physical appearance and personality using adjectives.
Students talk about animals, their habitats and characteristics.
Students use can/can't to describe animal abilities.
Students describe Turkish and international festivals and celebrations.

haftalar.kazanim: E5.8.2 — Past simple: regular and irregular verbs
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use past simple to talk about past events and celebrations.
Students describe clothing and practice shopping dialogues.
Students ask about and state prices; use quantity expressions.

haftalar.kazanim: E5.10.1 — Means of transport and travel
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students talk about means of transport and travel experiences.

haftalar.kazanim: E5.10.2 — Past simple in travel narratives
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students write and speak about past travel experiences.

haftalar.kazanim: Mid-year review: present simple and likes/dislikes
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Review of present simple, frequency adverbs and expressions of preference.
Review of past simple tense with regular and irregular verbs.
Review of key vocabulary from all units.
Integrated reading and writing activities.
Integrated listening and speaking activities.
Comprehensive year-end review of all units and skills.
